about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: ML engineer, backend developer, architect
about.bio_1: I design and develop production-ready AI platforms, microservice architectures, and cloud-based data processing systems. Over 5 years in software development, with the last 3 years focused on ML/AI infrastructure.
about.bio_2: Built a cloud platform for speech AI services (10 microservices, GPU inference), a contract risk analysis system with fine-tuned LLM, a SOC platform with ML-based attack detection, and several other products.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Notes on ML, architecture, and development
blog.empty: No posts yet. Articles coming soon.

expertise.backend_desc: Python, FastAPI, asyncio, microservice architecture. Designing high-load APIs, WebSocket services, and distributed data processing systems.
expertise.ml_desc: PyTorch, Transformers, LLM fine-tuning, vLLM inference. Building end-to-end ML pipelines from experiments to production with GPU optimization.
expertise.data_desc: PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, vector databases (pgvector, FAISS, Milvus). Designing data schemas, ETL processes, and search systems.
expertise.infra_desc: Docker, GitLab CI/CD, Grafana, monitoring. Setting up containerization, deployment automation, and observability stack for ML services.
